response.global_analysis: The video features a drawing game segment from a VTuber stream. Spoken audio consists of English and Japanese banter between the 'mother' (Kiara) and the 'babies' (Kobo, Luna, Biboo, Iofi). No song lyrics were provided in the reference JSON as it is a conversational segment. Subtitles are synchronized to the vocal audio, capturing the main dialogue and key 'baby talk' responses, including on-screen text for the intro.

subtitles.original: キアラ、子守り頼んだよ〜
subtitles.english: Kiara, I asked you to babysit!

subtitles.original: Did you understand?
subtitles.english: Did you understand?

subtitles.original: わかった！ わかった！
subtitles.english: Understood! Understood!

subtitles.original: Okay! Doesn't matter. Everybody, I think we should play a game, yeah?
subtitles.english: Okay! Doesn't matter. Everybody, I think we should play a game, yeah?

subtitles.original: Okay! No problem. I have an idea. We're gonna draw something over there.
subtitles.english: Okay! No problem. I have an idea. We're gonna draw something over there.

subtitles.original: I'm gonna draw something, and you all will guess what it is!
subtitles.english: I'm gonna draw something, and you all will guess what it is!

subtitles.original: ばば？
subtitles.english: Baba?

subtitles.original: Yeah! And if you get it right, you'll get a big cake! How about that?
subtitles.english: Yeah! And if you get it right, you'll get a big cake! How about that?

subtitles.original: Are you ready?
subtitles.english: Are you ready?

subtitles.original: Yes! Babu!
subtitles.english: Yes! Babu!

subtitles.original: Okay! We'll start with round one!
subtitles.english: Okay! We'll start with round one!

subtitles.original: While I draw, you will behave! いい子にしてね〜
subtitles.english: While I draw, you will behave! Be good babies, okay?

subtitles.original: 座って！ ここに、座って、座って、座って！
subtitles.english: Sit down! Sit here, sit, sit, sit!

subtitles.original: It's finished! Everybody, please take a look! 見て見て！
subtitles.english: It's finished! Everybody, please take a look! Look, look!

subtitles.original: What is this? What is this thing?
subtitles.english: What is this? What is this thing?

subtitles.original: これは、何でしょう？
subtitles.english: What is this, I wonder?

subtitles.original: にゃ？ ねこ？ 猫？ Cat! Cat!
subtitles.english: Nya? Neko? Cat! Cat! Cat!

subtitles.original: Maybe! Potential answer. もしかしたら、そうかもしれないけど...
subtitles.english: Maybe! Potential answer. It might be that, but...

subtitles.original: What does Yopi-chan think that this is?
subtitles.english: What does Yopi-chan think this is?

subtitles.original: かば？ かば！
subtitles.english: Hippo? Hippo!

subtitles.original: こぼ！ こぼ！ こぼ！
subtitles.english: Kobo! Kobo! Kobo!

subtitles.original: I don't think so... But we will see! We will see!
subtitles.english: I don't think so... But we will see! We will see!

subtitles.original: Biboo-chan! What do you think that is over there?
subtitles.english: Biboo-chan! What do you think that is over there?

subtitles.original: うんち！
subtitles.english: Poop!

subtitles.original: え？ Is my drawing that bad? そんなにひどい？
subtitles.english: What? Is my drawing that bad? Is it that bad?

subtitles.original: Abugo-bo! Not unchi, what is this? Tell me!
subtitles.english: Abugo-bo! It's not poop, what is this? Tell me!

subtitles.original: いん... いんご... いんご... いぬ！
subtitles.english: Do... Do... Do... Dog!

subtitles.original: いぬ？ りんご？ りんご？
subtitles.english: Dog? Apple? Apple?

subtitles.original: Yes! いぬ！ 正解！
subtitles.english: Yes! Dog! Correct!

subtitles.original: Okay! Round two! Start time!
subtitles.english: Okay! Round two! Start time!

subtitles.original: Please behave, okay? シー... スタート！
subtitles.english: Please behave, okay? Shh... Start!

subtitles.original: じゃじゃ！ Look at this!
subtitles.english: Ta-da! Look at this!

subtitles.original: Let's think, what could it be?
subtitles.english: Let's think, what could it be?

subtitles.original: Yopi-chan! What do you think that that is?
subtitles.english: Yopi-chan! What do you think that is?

subtitles.original: ドリアン！ ドリアン... ドリアン！
subtitles.english: Durian! Durian... Durian!

subtitles.original: ルナちゃん！ ルナちゃん、見て見て！ バブ、これ何？
subtitles.english: Luna-chan! Luna-chan, look, look! Baby, what is this?

subtitles.original: くさい！ くさい！ くさい！
subtitles.english: Stinky! Stinky! Stinky!

subtitles.original: So also durian? Maybe, maybe, could be!
subtitles.english: So also durian? Maybe, maybe, could be!

subtitles.original: What do you think people, what is that over there? Think, think, think!
subtitles.english: What do you think people, what is that over there? Think, think, think!

subtitles.original: Banana!
subtitles.english: Banana!

subtitles.original: You know banana is yellow.
subtitles.english: You know banana is yellow.

subtitles.original: Please save me, what is this?
subtitles.english: Please save me, what is this?
